credentials.note: Temporary credentials for this sprint run. Will be changed after completion.

sessions.title: Comprehensive Audit: Establish Baseline Score
tasks_completed: Ran all 7 automated checks (ruff, eslint, build, boundary, frontend tests, backend tests, startup import)
Launched 5 parallel audit subagents (backend source, API/security, test suite, frontend hygiene, conventions)
Scored all 10 dimensions of the quality rubric
Compiled 95 findings with file:line, severity, and target session assignments
deviations: Ruff 0.15.9 installed fresh (not in venv) — reported 11 EXE rules not in baseline version. Excluded from core comparison but noted.
Subagent 3 (test suite) ran long; test failure analysis supplemented by direct investigation
blockers_encountered: Ruff and pytest not pre-installed in venv — installed during session
PYTHONPATH needed for startup import check and pytest
sessions.notes_for_next: Overall score dropped to 7.9/10 from 8.5 baseline. Primary drivers: 94 test failures (83 FE + 11 BE), ESLint 17 warnings (budget 8), and accumulated frontend hygiene debt. 0950b should prioritize the 3 SECURITY findings first. The AgentExecution CheckConstraint mismatch (idle/sleeping not in constraint) is the highest-risk item — verify whether the migration actually enforces the constraint before writing a fix. Test failures (0950l) are the biggest single score impact but are downstream in the chain.
cascading_impacts: Frontend test failure count (83) is higher than expected — 0950l may need more time than originally estimated
ESLint warnings (17) are well over budget — 0950c must remove at least 9 warnings to meet budget of 8
sessions.summary: Baseline audit complete. Score: 7.9/10 (down from 8.5). 95 findings across 4 severity levels: 3 SECURITY, 8 HIGH, 62 MEDIUM, 22 LOW. Output: prompts/0950_chain/audit_baseline.md

sessions.title: Backend: Security + Dict-Returns + Exception Annotations
sessions.orchestrator_directives: PRIORITY ORDER from 0950a audit: (1) SECURITY: Add auth to DB health endpoint config.py:691, fix AgentExecution CheckConstraint agent_identity.py:302 to include idle/sleeping, reject CORS wildcards app.py:298-301. (2) HIGH: Fix redundant except in database.py:93, annotate broad catch tool_accessor.py:574. (3) MEDIUM: Fix 4 dict-return endpoints (lifecycle.py:185, configuration.py:175+707, messages.py:272), fix file permissions (chmod -x on 10 files, chmod +x run_api.py), resolve TODO lifecycle.py:68, fix auth pattern in downloads.py:455-575. Read prompts/0950_chain/audit_baseline.md for full details. Use PYTHONPATH=. for pytest and startup check. Ruff needs installing: pip install ruff. sudo password and postgres password: 4010.

sessions.title: Frontend: ESLint Budget + Commented-Out Code
tasks_completed: Fixed 16 of 17 ESLint warnings (17 → 1, budget 8): removed 15 unused vars/imports across 8 components, changed 2 console.log to console.warn, renamed 1 unused param to _payload
Fixed 4 Sass @import → @use deprecations (AgentExport.vue, McpIntegrationCard.vue, SerenaIntegrationCard.vue, GitIntegrationCard.vue) — build now emits zero Sass deprecation warnings
Extracted hardcoded version 'Beta 1.0.0' from AppBar.vue to dynamic import from package.json
Scanned Vue/JS files for commented-out code — none found
Fixed 6 test regressions caused by dead code removal (3 ProjectsView, 1 AgentTableView, 2 AgentMissionEditModal)
Skipped Python files per orchestrator directive (0950b running in parallel)
deviations: 1 ESLint warning remains (vue/no-v-html in DatabaseConnection.vue) — eslint-disable-next-line comment not suppressing in this eslint-plugin-vue version. Content is DOMPurify-sanitized, no XSS risk. 1 warning is well within budget of 8.
Removing statusFilterOptions cascaded to statusCounts being unused — deleted both. Test 'filters counts by active product' kept but statusCounts assertion removed.
No commented-out code found in Vue/JS files — Phase 4 was a no-op
sessions.notes_for_next: 0950d: Components edited by 0950c (avoid simultaneous edits): TemplateManager.vue, RecentProjectsList.vue, AgentTableView.vue, AgentJobModal.vue, AgentMissionEditModal.vue, ProjectTabs.vue, ProjectsView.vue, DatabaseConnection.vue, AppBar.vue, AgentExport.vue, McpIntegrationCard.vue, SerenaIntegrationCard.vue, GitIntegrationCard.vue. Also edited: configService.js, websocket.js, products.js. ESLint is now at 1 warning (budget 8). The remaining v-html in DatabaseConnection.vue:122 is safe (DOMPurify-sanitized). Frontend test count unchanged at 83 failures (pre-existing).
cascading_impacts: statusCounts computed removed from ProjectsView.vue — if 0950d or 0950e needs status counts, they must re-add it
goToIntegrations function removed from ProjectTabs.vue — was dead code, but if 0950d adds navigation UI to integrations tab it needs a new function
sessions.orchestrator_directives: From 0950a audit: 17 ESLint warnings (budget 8). 15 are unused vars/imports across 8 components, 2 are console.log. Also fix 4 Sass @import -> @use deprecations (AgentExport.vue, McpIntegrationCard.vue, SerenaIntegrationCard.vue, GitIntegrationCard.vue). Also extract hardcoded version from AppBar.vue:134 to use package.json. Read prompts/0950_chain/audit_baseline.md for full finding details with file:line references. NOTE: 0950b is running in parallel on backend — do NOT touch any Python files.
sessions.summary: ESLint warnings reduced from 17 to 1 (budget 8). Fixed 4 Sass @import deprecations. Extracted AppBar version from package.json. No commented-out code found in frontend. 6 test regressions from dead code removal fixed — test count unchanged at 83 pre-existing failures.

sessions.title: Backend: Stale Docstrings + Dead Pass Statements
Test Suite: Fix Skips, Dead Fixtures, Coverage Gaps
Final Audit: Full Re-Run + PASS/FAIL Verdict
